personas.name: Jordan
personas.voice: Owns positioning and launches for the core platform. Spends days writing briefs, in launch reviews, and arguing with sales about messaging consistency.

personas.name: Priya
personas.voice: Focused on enterprise-tier ICPs. Lives in sales calls, win/loss interviews, and pricing model conversations. Translates field signal into positioning.

personas.name: Alex
personas.voice: Owns thought leadership, blog, and webinar series. Writes a lot, edits more. Always negotiating between SEO best practices and on-brand voice.

personas.name: Casey
personas.voice: Builds battlecards, pitch decks, and competitive analysis. In daily contact with sales reps. Knows where the pitch falls apart by Wednesday.

personas.name: Sam
personas.voice: Manages relationships with Gartner, Forrester. Coordinates briefings and survey responses. Values consistency and corporate-grade polish.
